task.title: Multi-Channel Integration Services
task.description: Implement Discord, Email, and Webhook services with Effect composability

implementation.details:
1. Create DiscordService for webhook delivery
2. Implement EmailService with SMTP support
3. Add WebhookService with HMAC signature verification
4. Use Effect.all for parallel delivery testing
5. Implement unified error handling across channels

task.acceptance_criteria: All channel services deliver notifications successfully, error handling consistent across channels, parallel testing works
